revision.comment: better, since the colon follows immediately
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]
[[Image:Symbol OK.png|40px|right|The errors listed here are believed to have been corrected]]

[[Image:Yes check.svg|20px]] '''Done'''<noinclude>
The captionless version of this template is available at [[Template:Tick]]</noinclude>

[[Image:Yes check.svg|20px]] '''Done'''<noinclude>

[[Image:Yes check.svg|20px]] '''Done'''<noinclude>
The captionless version of this template is available at [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:not done]]. The captionless version of this template is available at [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]</noinclude>

{{<includeonly>sub</includeonly><includeonly>st:</includeonly>tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:not done]]. The captionless version of this template is available at [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]</noinclude>

See also [[Template:not done]]. The captionless version of this template is available at [[Template:Tick]].

[[Category:Uncategorized templates]]
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Uncategorized templates]]
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: move away from the green tick which is associated with marking policies as such
revision.text:
{{tick|black=1}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Replaced image with more consistent version. If you disagree with this, revert.
revision.text:
[[Image:Symbol support vote.svg|20px]] '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: large image size causing text display problems, 10x10 should work better, hopefully
revision.text:
{{tick|10}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

{{tick|18}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

{{tick|18}} {{{1|'''Done'''}}}<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Tweak for bolding of overridden text arg
Might or might not be better.
safesubst, <!-- template:done--> to allow for clean substitution if desired
match icon size to line height
restore image to 18px; editors reducing the check mark size in future may want to read the bottom section of [[Special:Redirect/revision/588281707]] and threads from 2007 on the talk page
per my request on talk page and ensuing discussion.
code tweak to prevent MW parsing of ":" as <dd>
to keep checkmark and "done" (or whatever text) together on the same line
and alt= text, request on talk page
Per [[Wikipedia:Alternative text for images#Examples]], the icon is purely decorative and does not need alt text.
no reason that should have to be explicitly named
Wrap check mark and Done text in nowrap span to keep them together, after much testing in the sandbox and on the testcases page. See talk page.
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors when first parameter is present but empty.
better, since the colon follows immediately

revision.text: [[Image:Symbol OK.png|40px|right|The errors listed here are believed to have been corrected]]

per my request on talk page and ensuing discussion.
code tweak to prevent MW parsing of ":" as <dd>
to keep checkmark and "done" (or whatever text) together on the same line
and alt= text, request on talk page
Per [[Wikipedia:Alternative text for images#Examples]], the icon is purely decorative and does not need alt text.
no reason that should have to be explicitly named
Wrap check mark and Done text in nowrap span to keep them together, after much testing in the sandbox and on the testcases page. See talk page.
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors when first parameter is present but empty.
better, since the colon follows immediately

revision.comment: Tweak for bolding of overridden text arg
Might or might not be better.
safesubst, <!-- template:done--> to allow for clean substitution if desired
match icon size to line height
per my request on talk page and ensuing discussion.
code tweak to prevent MW parsing of ":" as <dd>
to keep checkmark and "done" (or whatever text) together on the same line
and alt= text, request on talk page
Per [[Wikipedia:Alternative text for images#Examples]], the icon is purely decorative and does not need alt text.
no reason that should have to be explicitly named
Wrap check mark and Done text in nowrap span to keep them together, after much testing in the sandbox and on the testcases page. See talk page.
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors when first parameter is present but empty.
better, since the colon follows immediately

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Replaced image with more consistent version. If you disagree with this, revert.
revision.text:
[[Image:Symbol support vote.svg|20px]] '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]].
[[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]</noinclude>

{{tick}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].

[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: large image size causing text display problems, 10x10 should work better, hopefully
revision.text:
{{tick|10}} '''Done'''<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].

[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]

{{tick|18}} {{{1|'''Done'''}}}<noinclude>
See also [[Template:Not done]] and [[Template:Doing]]. For the tick alone, use [[Template:Tick]].
[[Category:Image with comment templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[ar:قالب:تم]] [[ca:plantilla:Fet]] [[da:Skabelon:Gjort]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Tweak for bolding of overridden text arg
Might or might not be better.
safesubst, <!-- template:done--> to allow for clean substitution if desired
[[Help:Reverting|Reverted]] edits by [[Special:Contributions/Plastikspork|Plastikspork]] ([[User talk:Plastikspork|talk]]) to last version by Magog the Ogre
match icon size to line height
per my request on talk page and ensuing discussion.
code tweak to prevent MW parsing of ":" as <dd>
to keep checkmark and "done" (or whatever text) together on the same line
and alt= text, request on talk page
Per [[Wikipedia:Alternative text for images#Examples]], the icon is purely decorative and does not need alt text.
no reason that should have to be explicitly named
Wrap check mark and Done text in nowrap span to keep them together, after much testing in the sandbox and on the testcases page. See talk page.
Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors when first parameter is present but empty.
better, since the colon follows immediately
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Done here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[File:Yes check.svg|18px|link=|alt=]]''' {{{1|Done}}}'''{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|{{{note|{{{reason|}}}}}}}}}|: {{{2|{{{note|{{{reason}}}}}}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: [[File:Yes check.svg|18px|link=|alt=]]''' {{{1|Done}}}'''{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|{{{note|{{{reason|}}}}}}}}}|: {{{2|{{{note|{{{reason}}}}}}}}}}} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
